elements.original_description: A stern-looking financial advisor in a suit sits behind a desk, raising an eyebrow while looking at a document. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: high-quality photograph of a stern-looking financial advisor in a suit sitting behind a polished desk, raising an eyebrow while critically examining a financial document. Cinematic lighting emphasizing a serious, judgmental mood, sharp focus, detailed textures, and soft bokeh in the background. Professional office environment, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A nervous person with wide eyes and a worried expression stands in front of the advisor, clutching their hands together. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: high-quality photograph of a nervous person with wide eyes and a worried expression standing in front of an advisor, clutching their hands together anxiously. Cinematic lighting capturing a tense, fearful mood, shallow depth of field, high resolution, detailed facial expression, soft bokeh background. Professional office setting, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
